question: What does the Japanese idiom '{{ja-JP|猿も木から落ちる|saru mo ki kara ochiru|SA-roo mo KI ka-ra o-CHI-roo}}' most naturally mean?
correctAnswer: Even experts make mistakes.

explanation: This idiom is used in everyday japanese for the idea 'Even experts make mistakes.'.
